svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="测试金字塔对照" id="td2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-130" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="good" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="真金字塔：各层各管一段" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="280" x="80" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gut" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="UT
毫秒级 · 纯逻辑边界" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="100" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="git" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="IT
秒级 · 真实库集成" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="150" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ge2e" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="E2E
分钟级 · 关键路径" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="80" x="190" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bad" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#b45309;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="反金字塔：E2E 肥大" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="280" x="560" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="but" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="UT 极少
只测 happy path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="580" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="IT 被 mock 掉" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="640" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="be2e" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="E2E 肥大：全量塞进来
跑 40 分钟，团队嫌慢降频率" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="600" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="左：底宽顶窄，快而多在下、慢而少在上。右：倒过来，慢的全堆顶上，跑不动就形同虚设。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="780" x="60" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
